products.name: Madeleines
products.ingredientsText: SUGAR, ENRICHED FLOUR [WHEAT FLOUR, MALTED BARLEY FLOUR, NIACIN, REDUCED IRON, THIAMINE MONONITRATE, RIBOFLAVIN, FOLIC ACID], BUTTER [CREAM, SALT], EGGS, NATURAL FLAVORINGS, EGG WHITES, BAKING POWDER [SODIUM ACID PYROPHOSPHATE, BAKING SODA, CORNSTARCH, MONOCALCIUM PHOSPHATE].

products.name: Petite Vanilla Bean Scone
products.ingredientsText: ENRICHED FLOUR [WHEAT FLOUR, MALTED BARLEY FLOUR, NIACIN, IRON, THIAMINE MONONITRATE, RIBOFLAVIN, FOLIC ACID], HEAVY CREAM [CREAM, MILK], BUTTER [CREAM, NATURAL FLAVORS], EGGS, SOYBEAN OIL, NONFAT MILK, SOY LECITHIN.

products.name: Chocolate Croissant
products.ingredientsText: Enriched Wheat Flour [Wheat Flour, Niacin, Reduced Iron, Ascorbic Acid, Thiamine Mononitrate, Riboflavin, Folic Acid, Enzyme], Butter [Cream (Milk), Natural Flavor], Semisweet Chocolate [Sugar, Chocolate Liquor, Cocoa Butter, Soy Lecithin, Natural Flavor], Eggs, Dry Whole Milk, Fermented Wheat Flour, Wheat Gluten.

products.name: Cheese Danish
products.ingredientsText: ENRICHED WHEAT FLOUR [WHEAT FLOUR, NIACIN, REDUCED IRON, ASCORBIC ACID, THIAMINE MONONITRATE, RIBOFLAVIN, FOLIC ACID, ENZYME], NEUFCHATEL CHEESE [PASTEURIZED CULTURED MILK AND CREAM, SALT], BUTTER [CREAM (MILK), NATURAL FLAVOR], DRY WHOLE MILK, EGGS, FERMENTED WHEAT FLOUR, WHEAT GLUTEN.

products.name: Potato, Cheddar & Chive Bakes
products.ingredientsText: DICED POTATOES, EGGS, COTTAGE CHEESE [CULTURED NONFAT MILK, MILK, CREAM, NONFAT MILK], CHEDDAR CHEESE [CULTURED PASTEURIZED MILK, SALT], MONTEREY JACK CHEESE, GRUYERE CHEESE, WHITE CHEDDAR CHEESE, UNSALTED BUTTER [PASTEURIZED CREAM, NATURAL FLAVORS].

products.name: Italian Sausage Egg Bites
products.ingredientsText: EGGS, COTTAGE CHEESE [CULTURED NONFAT MILK, MILK, NONFAT MILK], SHREDDED MONTEREY JACK CHEESE [CULTURED PASTEURIZED MILK, SALT], PARMESAN CHEESE [PASTEURIZED MILK, CHEESE CULTURES, SALT], UNSALTED BUTTER [PASTEURIZED CREAM, NATURAL FLAVORS].
